avoid: Using scalar-only kernels for matrix operations without careful numerical validation
evidence: Correctness failed for all shapes (3584, 4096, 4608) with max absolute errors up to 4.77 and relative L2 errors around 0.0003
Kernel uses scalar operations (vector_width=1) which may introduce numerical instability or bugs in the rank-16 update computation
No performance data available due to benchmark failure, but correctness failure dominates

recommended_actions: check rank-16 indexing and vector alignment
Debug and fix the custom rank-16 update kernel to ensure correct computation of A @ (B.T @ X)
Consider using vectorized loads/stores (e.g., float4) to improve numerical accuracy and performance
Test with a simple reference implementation to isolate the error source
